title: Login with valid credentials
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the login screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Enter a valid email address into the email field | Enter a valid password into the password field | Tap the 'Sign In' button
expected_result: The user is successfully logged in and redirected to the home screen

title: Login with invalid credentials
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the login screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Enter an invalid email address into the email field | Enter a valid password into the password field | Tap the 'Sign In' button
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials

title: Login with empty fields
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the login screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Enter an empty email address into the email field | Enter an empty password into the password field | Tap the 'Sign In' button
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating required fields are empty

title: Login with 'Show' toggle
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the login screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Enter a valid email address into the email field | Enter a valid password into the password field | Toggle the 'Show' button to reveal the password | Tap the 'Sign In' button
expected_result: The user is successfully logged in and redirected to the home screen

title: Cancel button functionality
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the login screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Enter a valid email address into the email field | Enter a valid password into the password field | Tap the 'Cancel' button
expected_result: The user is returned to the previous screen

title: Forgot password link functionality
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the login screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Enter a valid email address into the email field | Enter a valid password into the password field | Tap the 'Forgot your password?' link
expected_result: The user is redirected to the password reset screen

title: Navigation to other screens
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the login screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Enter a valid email address into the email field | Enter a valid password into the password field | Tap the 'Sign In' button | Check if the user is successfully logged in and redirected to the home screen
expected_result: The user is successfully logged in and redirected to the home screen
